items.title: NT Police say some in community 'absolutely know' where suspected abductor is

children.content: Northern Territory Police say some people in the community "absolutely know" where missing five-year-old girl Sharon Granites's suspected abductor is, and are imploring anyone with information that could help find them to come forward.

articles.title: As search for missing 5yo Sharon continues, a clearer picture of that night emerges

children.content: Five-year-old Sharon Granites vanished from an Alice Springs town camp late on Saturday night, with police alleging she has been abducted. Here's what we know about the night she went missing.

image.altText: young girl in blue shirt sits in chair holding arms out front

articles.title: Criminal history of man police are searching for over missing 5yo girl revealed

children.content: A man being sought in connection with the alleged abduction of five-year-old Sharon Granites near Alice Springs has a long history of violence and prison time in the Northern Territory.

image.altText: A mugshot of an Aboriginal man, serious expression looking directly at camera, yellow / orange pigment behind brown eyes.

items.title: Inflation details may give RBA pause for thought on interest rates

children.content: While inflation remains well above the Reserve Bank's target, there are details in the numbers that may give it reasons to hold off another rate hike in May.

articles.title: Inflation rises to highest level since 2023, ASX drops for seventh consecutive day — as it happened

children.content: ABS data shows a rise in inflation to 4.6 per cent in March, the highest since September 2023, after another negative day for the ASX with the Reserve Bank widely expected to lift interest rates again next week. Look back on our live blog.

items.title: High fuel costs a 'kick in the guts' for country clubs, but the game must go on

children.content: Country sporting clubs are rallying to help families keep coming to fixtures as fuel prices double, with some travelling up to 640km. But it's a hefty cost regional and rural families are prepared to take on if it means maintaining their sporting commitments which are so integral to mental wellbeing and social connectivity.
